name: qwen36_reasoning_only_after_diagnostic_20260511
notes: Qwen3.6 accepted the diagnostic tool output, reasoned that it should create index.html, then returned only a reasoning item. Codex ended the run with no last agent message. OpenGate should keep the loop alive with a safe diagnostic shell call.

content.text: Build an immersive, visually striking, interactive webpage in index.html.

input.output: Open Gate blocked an invalid shell command (unbounded_web_fetch). Do not retry that route; proceed from the prompt and create the requested artifact directly.

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Runs a Powershell command (Windows) and returns its output.

content.text: The shell command executed successfully and confirmed that I shouldn't retry fetching the web page. Now I need to create the index.html file.

expected_output_fragments: Open Gate detected a model response with reasoning only and no tool call or final message
